description:
As a registered user
  I want to login to my account
  So that I can access the application

elements.name: Successful user login with valid credentials

steps.name: I am on the login page
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see a login success message

elements.name: Login fails with empty required fields

steps.name: I am on the login page
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see validation errors for empty login fields
I should see "Please enter a valid email address"
I should see "Password must be at least 8 characters long"

elements.name: Login fails with invalid email format

steps.name: I am on the login page
I fill in the email field with "invalid-email"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see "Please enter a valid email address"

elements.name: Login fails with short password

steps.name: I am on the login page
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "123"
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see "Password must be at least 8 characters long"

elements.name: Remember me checkbox functionality

steps.name: I am on the login page
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I check the "Remember me" checkbox
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see a login success message
the remember me checkbox should be checked

elements.name: Clicking Google Sign-in button

steps.name: I am on the login page
I click the "Sign in with Google" button
the Google signin handler should be called

elements.name: Password visibility toggle functionality

steps.name: I am on the login page
I fill in the password field with "mypassword"
the password should be hidden by default
I click the password visibility toggle button
the password should be visible
I click the password visibility toggle button again
the password should be hidden again

elements.name: Form fields clear errors when user starts typing

steps.name: I am on the login page
I click the "Sign In" button
I should see validation errors for empty login fields
I start typing in the email field
the email field error should disappear

elements.name: Navigation to registration page

steps.name: I am on the login page
I click the "Sign up" link
I should be redirected to the registration page

elements.name: Form is responsive on mobile devices

steps.name: I am on the login page
I am using a mobile device
I view the login page
the hero section should be hidden
the form should take full width

elements.name: Form validation provides visual feedback

steps.name: I am on the login page
I click the "Sign In" button
form fields with errors should have red borders
I fill in the email field with "test@example.com"
the email field should have normal border styling

elements.name: Forgot password link functionality

steps.name: I am on the login page
I should see the "Forgot your password?" link
I click the "Forgot your password?" link
the forgot password handler should be called

name: User Login

description:
As a registered user
  I want to sort photos in the gallery by different criteria
  So that I can find and view photos in my preferred order (newest, oldest, most liked, most favorited)

elements.name: Sort dropdown displays correctly on all gallery pages

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on any gallery page (All Photos, My Photos, Public Photos, Liked Photos, Favorited Photos)
the page loads
the sort dropdown should be visible above the photo grid
the sort dropdown should display the current sort option
the sort dropdown should have 4 options: "Newest", "Oldest", "Most Liked", "Most Favorited"

elements.name: Sort photos by newest first

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the All Photos gallery page
photos exist with different creation dates
the user selects "Newest" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed with the most recently created photos first
the photos should be ordered by creation date descending
the sort dropdown should show "Newest" as selected

elements.name: Sort photos by oldest first

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the All Photos gallery page
photos exist with different creation dates
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed with the oldest created photos first
the photos should be ordered by creation date ascending
the sort dropdown should show "Oldest" as selected

elements.name: Sort photos by most liked

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the All Photos gallery page
photos exist with different like counts
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed with the highest like count first
the photos should be ordered by like count descending
photos with equal like counts should be ordered by newest creation date
the sort dropdown should show "Most Liked" as selected

elements.name: Sort photos by most favorited

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the All Photos gallery page
photos exist with different favorite counts
the user selects "Most Favorited" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed with the highest favorite count first
the photos should be ordered by favorite count descending
photos with equal favorite counts should be ordered by newest creation date
the sort dropdown should show "Most Favorited" as selected

elements.name: Sort preference persists in URL

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the All Photos gallery page
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the URL should update to include "sortBy=mostLiked" parameter
the browser address bar should show the updated URL
the user copies the URL and opens it in a new tab
the gallery should load with "Most Liked" sort applied
the sort dropdown should show "Most Liked" as selected

elements.name: Sort preference persists after page refresh

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user has selected "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the URL contains "sortBy=oldest" parameter
the user refreshes the page
the photos should still be sorted by oldest first
the sort dropdown should show "Oldest" as selected
the URL should still contain "sortBy=oldest" parameter

elements.name: Default sort is newest when no sortBy parameter

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user navigates to the gallery page without a sortBy parameter
the page loads
the photos should be sorted by newest first (default)
the sort dropdown should show "Newest" as selected
the URL should not contain a sortBy parameter (implicit default)

elements.name: Sort works on My Photos page

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the My Photos page
the user has uploaded multiple photos
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be sorted by oldest first
only the user's own photos should be displayed
the URL should contain "sortBy=oldest" parameter

elements.name: Sort works on Public Photos page

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the Public Photos page
there are public photos from multiple users
the user selects "Most Favorited" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be sorted by favorite count descending
only public photos should be displayed
the URL should contain "sortBy=mostFavorited" parameter

elements.name: Sort works on Liked Photos page

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the Liked Photos page
the user has liked multiple photos
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be sorted by like count descending

result.error_message:
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf

Expected substring: "sortBy=mostLiked"
Received string:    "http://localhost:3002/myprofile/liked-photos"
    at Proxy.<anonymous> (/Users/isnendyankp/Desktop/Programmer/Belajar/Project/Template/IKP-Labs/node_modules/playwright/lib/matchers/expect.js:221:24)
    at World.<anonymous> (/Users/isnendyankp/Desktop/Programmer/Belajar/Project/Template/IKP-Labs/tests/gherkin/steps/photo-sorting.steps.ts:386:15)

steps.name: only photos the user has liked should be displayed
the URL should contain "sortBy=mostLiked" parameter

elements.name: Sort works on Favorited Photos page

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the Favorited Photos page
the user has favorited multiple photos
the user selects "Newest" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be sorted by creation date descending
only photos the user has favorited should be displayed
the URL should contain "sortBy=newest" parameter

elements.name: Sort works with filter=all

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "All Photos" filter selected
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the URL should contain both "filter=all" and "sortBy=oldest" parameters
all public photos should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by oldest first
the sort dropdown should show "Oldest" as selected
the All Photos filter button should be highlighted

elements.name: Sort works with filter=my-photos

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "My Photos" filter selected
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the URL should contain both "filter=my-photos" and "sortBy=mostLiked" parameters
only the user's photos should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by like count descending
the sort dropdown should show "Most Liked" as selected
the My Photos filter button should be highlighted

elements.name: Sort works with filter=public

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "Public Photos" filter selected
the user selects "Most Favorited" from the sort dropdown
the URL should contain both "filter=public" and "sortBy=mostFavorited" parameters
only public photos should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by favorite count descending
the sort dropdown should show "Most Favorited" as selected
the Public Photos filter button should be highlighted

elements.name: Sort works with filter=liked

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "Liked Photos" filter selected
the user selects "Newest" from the sort dropdown
the URL should contain both "filter=liked" and "sortBy=newest" parameters
only photos the user has liked should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by creation date descending
the sort dropdown should show "Newest" as selected
the Liked Photos filter button should be highlighted

elements.name: Sort works with filter=favorited

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "Favorited Photos" filter selected
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the URL should contain both "filter=favorited" and "sortBy=oldest" parameters
only photos the user has favorited should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by creation date ascending
the sort dropdown should show "Oldest" as selected
the Favorited Photos filter button should be highlighted

elements.name: Changing filter preserves sort preference

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "sortBy=mostLiked" selected
the user is viewing "All Photos" filter
the user clicks the "My Photos" filter button

result.error_message:
locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.

    at World.<anonymous> (/Users/isnendyankp/Desktop/Programmer/Belajar/Project/Template/IKP-Labs/tests/gherkin/steps/photo-sorting.steps.ts:181:22)

steps.name: the URL should update to "filter=my-photos&sortBy=mostLiked"
only the user's photos should be displayed
the photos should still be sorted by most liked
the sort dropdown should still show "Most Liked" as selected

elements.name: Changing sort preserves filter preference

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "filter=public" selected
the sort dropdown shows "Newest" as selected
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the URL should update to "filter=public&sortBy=oldest"
only public photos should be displayed
the photos should be sorted by oldest first
the Public Photos filter button should still be highlighted

elements.name: Sort dropdown appears even when no photos exist

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on a gallery page with no photos (empty state)
the page loads
the sort dropdown should still be visible
the sort dropdown should show the selected sort option
an empty state message should be displayed below the dropdown

elements.name: Photos with equal like counts are sorted by newest creation date

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
there are 3 photos all with 5 likes
Photo A was created at 2025-01-01
Photo B was created at 2025-01-02
Photo C was created at 2025-01-03
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed in order: Photo C, Photo B, Photo A
the like count should be the same for all 3 photos
the secondary sort should be by newest creation date

elements.name: Photos with equal favorite counts are sorted by newest creation date

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
there are 3 photos all with 10 favorites
Photo X was created at 2025-01-01 10:00
Photo Y was created at 2025-01-01 11:00
Photo Z was created at 2025-01-01 12:00
the user selects "Most Favorited" from the sort dropdown
the photos should be displayed in order: Photo Z, Photo Y, Photo X
the favorite count should be the same for all 3 photos
the secondary sort should be by newest creation date

elements.name: Browser back button restores previous sort state

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "sortBy=newest" selected
the user selects "Oldest" from the sort dropdown
the URL should update to "sortBy=oldest"
the user clicks the browser back button
the URL should return to "sortBy=newest"
the photos should be sorted by newest first
the sort dropdown should show "Newest" as selected

elements.name: Browser forward button restores next sort state

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page with "sortBy=newest" selected
the user has changed sort to "sortBy=oldest"
the user has clicked the browser back button (now at "sortBy=newest")
the user clicks the browser forward button
the URL should return to "sortBy=oldest"
the photos should be sorted by oldest first
the sort dropdown should show "Oldest" as selected

elements.name: Sorting uses optimized queries to prevent N+1 problems

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
there are 100 photos in the gallery
the user selects "Most Liked" from the sort dropdown
the backend should use a single optimized query with JOINs
the query should fetch photos with like counts in one database round trip
the page should load within acceptable performance limits (under 1 second)
no N+1 query issues should occur

elements.name: Invalid sortBy parameter defaults to newest

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user manually edits the URL to "sortBy=invalidOption"
the page loads
the backend should default to "newest" sort
the photos should be sorted by newest first
the sort dropdown should show "Newest" as selected
no error should be displayed to the user

elements.name: Sort dropdown is accessible via keyboard

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on the gallery page
the user tabs to the sort dropdown using the keyboard
the dropdown should receive focus
the user presses Enter or Space
the dropdown should open and show all 4 options
the user navigates options with arrow keys
the user should be able to select any option
the user presses Enter
the selected sort should be applied
the photos should re-sort accordingly

elements.name: Sort dropdown works correctly on mobile devices

steps.name: the user is authenticated with a valid JWT token
there are multiple photos available in the gallery with varying metadata
the user is on a mobile device (viewport width < 768px)
the user is on the gallery page
the page loads
the sort dropdown should be visible and properly sized
the user taps the sort dropdown
the dropdown should open with all 4 options visible
the user taps an option
the sort should be applied
the dropdown should close
the photos should re-sort accordingly

name: Gallery Photo Sorting

description:
As a new user
  I want to register an account
  So that I can access the application

elements.name: Successful user registration with valid data

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I fill in the name field with "John Doe"
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I fill in the confirm password field with "SecurePass123"
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see a success message

elements.name: Registration fails with empty required fields

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see validation errors for empty fields
I should see "Name must be at least 2 characters long"
I should see "Please enter a valid email address"
I should see "Password must be at least 8 characters long"

elements.name: Registration fails with invalid email format

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I fill in the name field with "John Doe"
I fill in the email field with "invalid-email"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I fill in the confirm password field with "SecurePass123"
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see "Please enter a valid email address"

elements.name: Registration fails with short password

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I fill in the name field with "John Doe"
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "123"
I fill in the confirm password field with "123"
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see "Password must be at least 8 characters long"

elements.name: Registration fails when passwords don't match

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I fill in the name field with "John Doe"
I fill in the email field with "john.doe@example.com"
I fill in the password field with "SecurePass123"
I fill in the confirm password field with "DifferentPass456"
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see "Passwords don't match"

elements.name: Clicking Google Sign-up button

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I click the "Sign up with Google" button
the Google signup handler should be called

elements.name: Form fields clear errors when user starts typing

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I click the "Create Account" button
I should see validation errors for empty fields
I start typing in the name field
the name field error should disappear

elements.name: Form is responsive on mobile devices

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I am using a mobile device
I view the registration page
the hero section should be hidden
the form should take full width

elements.name: Form validation provides visual feedback

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I click the "Create Account" button
form fields with errors should have red borders
I fill in the name field with "John"
the name field should have normal border styling

name: User Registration
